sections.title: Self-Classification
sections.description: Based on your current skill level, training, certifications, quality of work, and productivity.

fields.label: What level do you believe you are currently performing at?
options: Level 1 Skill Level: Beginner (LOF, basic, maintenance, tire install basic car repairs)
Level 2 Skill Level: Developing (Brakes, suspension, Basic diagnostics check engine lights, simple electrical)
Level 3 Skill Level: Advanced (Advanced diagnostics, CAN, drivability They don’t guess they diagnose)
Master Technician Skill Level: Elite (This tech can do it all without question or questions)

fields.label: Explain why you selected this level:

items.label: Proper use of scan tools and diagnostic equipment

sections.title: Goals & Career Path
sections.description: Reflect on your future goals and career path.

fields.label: Where do you see yourself in 6-12 months?
What support or training do you need from management?
What is one thing you will improve immediately?

values.f1: Level 1 Skill Level: Beginner (LOF, basic, maintenance, tire install basic car repairs)
values.f2: I am good at oil changes and tires and most recalls at this point and i have also done many different repairs to my car such as doing brake pads calipers and rotors, as well as cv axles and many other things.
values.f4: I can use the scan tool pretty good but i think there might be some things to learn with it still. I have learned a lot about engines in school and i feel like i could do some repairs on engines.
values.f5: i don’t know much if anything about transmissions and i have took classes on electrical but i still have yet to use my knowledge in real world scenarios. And i am sure i have more to learn on electrical, i have not had to diagnose drivability concerns too much yet.
values.f12: I double check everything before dropping the car to make sure it is tight and if i do a tire rotation i make sure everything is torqued down and i check for leaks.
values.f17: I have not had to write many concern, cause, and correction notes yet so i am sure i could get better at that, and i could probably be more detailed in my inspections and videos.
values.f19: I try to make sure i tell the advisors if there is anything they should know like if there is something that really needs to be done with a customer car like tires or brakes, i help anybody whenever i can, and i try to keep a positive and professional attitude.
values.f24: i would like to start doing flat rate jobs soon and get any training done that i need to do when it is published.
values.f29: Doing flat rate jobs and being more efficient on getting jobs done faster
values.f30: any training that is required for me to do or help me.
values.f31: my efficiency and being more confident in my abilities to worn something new.
